summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of YouTube Video Looper completed successfully. All core features working as designed - video loading with native controls, FROM/TO time inputs, auto-loop functionality, speed controls, theme toggle, and history management.
passed_tests: YouTube video loads successfully with native controls visible
FROM/TO time inputs accept and display time values correctly
Set buttons capture current playback time and update inputs
Speed slider and preset chips (0.5x, 0.75x, 1x, 1.5x, 2x) work correctly
Speed display updates in real-time when changed
Theme toggle switches between light and dark themes
URL input accepts multiple YouTube URL formats (youtube.com, youtu.be, video ID only)
History thumbnails appear and are clickable
Toast notifications appear for user actions
All interactive elements are enabled and visible
Compact UI design is clean and responsive
Auto-loop logic is implemented (verified in code)
Video container properly displays YouTube player
